55:
Hurt...? There wasn't even a fight. I was too late. Too <Emphasis>slow</Emphasis>.
And I thought I could protect you...

87:
Thank you for seeking me out, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>─it meant a lot to have you there at my side.
...I was tempted to set off again the moment we had decided upon a direction, but you have still to visit Alphinaud, haven't you?
